# LLMOps Run Report Template

**Standard ID:** STD-LLMOPS-RUN-REPORT-001
**Category:** llmops/reports
**Owner MCP:** CerebraLLMOps-mcp

## Purpose

Full LLMOps Run Report template from spec §21. Used for reporting on completed agent runs — especially high/critical risk runs and runs that required human review.

---

## Report Template

```markdown
# LLMOps Run Report

**Report ID:** report-<uuid>
**Generated:** <ISO 8601>
**Generated By:** LLMOps automated report | human reviewer

---

## 1. Task & Run Identity

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Task ID | task-<uuid> |
| Run ID | run-<uuid> |
| Agent ID | agent-<name> |
| Agent Instruction Version | <semver> |
| Tenant ID | <tenant_id> |
| Task Type | <task_type> |
| Risk Level | low / medium / high / critical |
| Initiated By | <user_id or agent_id> |
| Started At | <ISO 8601> |
| Completed At | <ISO 8601> |
| Duration | <ms> |

---

## 2. Context Usage

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Prompt ID | <prompt_id> |
| Prompt Version | <semver> |
| Model Requested | <model_id> |
| Model Used | <model_id> (may differ if fallback) |
| Fallback Triggered | YES / NO |
| Fallback Reason | <if YES: reason> |
| Documents Used | <count> / <max> |
| Code Nodes Used | <count> / <max> |
| Graph Nodes Used | <count> / <max> |
| Context Compressed | YES / NO |
| Context Quality Impact | none / low / medium / high |
| Sensitive Context Detected | YES / NO |

---

## 3. Cost & Token Usage

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Input Tokens | <count> |
| Output Tokens | <count> |
| Cache Read Tokens | <count> |
| Estimated Cost (USD) | $<value> |
| Token Budget Utilization | <used> / <max> (<pct>%) |
| Cost Budget Utilization | $<used> / $<max> (<pct>%) |

---

## 4. Latency

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total Latency | <ms> |
| Time to First Token | <ms> |
| Context Assembly Time | <ms> |
| LLM Call Time | <ms> |
| Eval Time | <ms> |
| SLO Target (p95) | <ms> |
| SLO Status | WITHIN SLO / SLO BREACHED |

---

## 5. Tool Calls

| Tool | Call Count | Success | Errors |
|------|-----------|---------|--------|
| <tool_name> | <count> | <count> | <count> |
| ... | | | |
| **Total** | <count> | <count> | <count> |

Forbidden tool attempts: <count> (should be 0)

---

## 6. Eval & Quality

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Eval Suite | <suite_id> / none |
| Eval Result | pass / fail / skip / pending |
| Weighted Pass Rate | <pct>% (threshold: <pct>%) |
| Failed Eval Cases | <list or "none"> |
| Schema Validation | passed / failed / not_required |
| Schema Retry Triggered | YES / NO |
| Hallucination Detected | YES / NO |
| Citations Verified | <count> verified / <count> total |
| Guardrail Triggers | <list of guardrail IDs triggered, or "none"> |

---

## 7. Feedback & Escalation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Human Review Required | YES / NO |
| Human Review Status | pending / approved / rejected / not_applicable |
| Human Reviewer | <reviewer_id> |
| Review Completed At | <ISO 8601> |
| Escalation Triggered | YES / NO |
| Escalation Trigger | <E-1 through E-8> |
| Feedback Submitted | YES / NO |
| Feedback ID | <feedback_id> |
| Feedback Severity | critical / high / medium / low / info |

---

## 8. Final Status

**OVERALL STATUS: `PASS` / `WARNING` / `FAIL`**

| Component | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| Schema Validation | PASS / FAIL / N/A |
| Eval | PASS / FAIL / SKIP |
| Guardrails | PASS (no triggers) / TRIGGERED (details above) |
| Human Review | APPROVED / REJECTED / PENDING / N/A |
| SLO | WITHIN / BREACHED |
| Cost | WITHIN BUDGET / OVER BUDGET |

**Decision:** <What was done with this output — delivered / blocked / pending / escalated>

---

## 9. Improvement Notes

*(Optional — complete for failed or WARNING runs)*

**Root cause of issues:**
<Describe why things went wrong, if applicable>

**Improvement items linked:**
<List IMP-XXX items from improvement-backlog.md>

**Recommended action:**
<What should be done to prevent recurrence>
```

---

## Status Definitions

| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `PASS` | All components passed; output delivered normally |
| `WARNING` | Minor issues detected (e.g., SLO breach, low-weight eval failure) but output delivered |
| `FAIL` | Output blocked due to eval failure, guardrail trigger, or human review rejection |

| Date | Author | Change |
|------|--------|--------|
